reforms.description: The Japanese government introduced a comprehensive economic package amounting to ¥15.3 trillion, which includes financial and tax incentives to encourage foreign investment, reforms to the land tax system, and support for the purchase of foreign automobiles and auto parts through financial assistance for exhibitions and training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The package aims to stimulate domestic demand and improve market conditions for foreign investment, which can enhance overall economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has implemented the measures outlined in the economic package.
reforms.importance_rationale: The comprehensive nature and significant financial commitment of the package indicate a major reform.
reforms.source_quote: Further changes in the land tax system, including a reduction in the capital gains tax as proposed in the February 1994 economic package and a further rise in the effective tax rate on land, would be important steps.
